projectDescription: Daniel Imbert's developer portfolio — an Android (Kotlin) engineer building scalable mobile apps with Jetpack Compose, OpenGL ES 3D rendering, and Svelte web side projects.
keyFeatures: Android development with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and clean architecture
3D rendering engine (Spatial) built on OpenGL ES 3.0 for Android
On-device AI object detection using YOLO11s (Iris)
Modular Android architecture with DI (Koin) and local persistence (Room)
Svelte web frontends with TypeScript and Appwrite BaaS integration
Cloudflare Workers for lightweight serverless APIs and auth flows
Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) exploration with Compose Desktop
publicApiSurface: Spatial — declarative 3D rendering library for Android (Compose-style API)
AlejoTaller — Android app with modular feature/core architecture + Appwrite backend
SatExplorer — real-time satellite orbit visualizer using Spatial + OpenGL ES 3.0
Deluxe — Android jewelry catalog/management app (Room + Koin + Appwrite)
Iris — on-device YOLO11s object detection with CameraX (experimental)
AppMakeup — architecture-first app scaffolding tool (KMP + Compose Desktop)
compose_svelted — declarative Svelte UI framework inspired by Jetpack Compose
dash_alejo_taller — Svelte + Appwrite product management web dashboard
starter-function — Cloudflare Workers / serverless function starter template
google_auth_appwrite — Cloudflare Worker for Google OAuth + Appwrite auth flow
telegram_messages — Node.js serverless function for Telegram Bot API messaging
list_users — Appwrite serverless function with Admin role access control
